name: oe-extension
description: Chrome extension for opening selected clinical text in OpenEvidence and rewriting selections into evidence-focused questions.

scripts.test: node tests/url-format.test.mjs && node tests/whitelist.test.mjs && node tests/settings.test.mjs && node tests/pico-prompt.test.mjs && node tests/tab-options.test.mjs && node tests/custom-prompts.test.mjs && node tests/theme.test.mjs
